item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n06","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"Negative-control case: the prompt only establishes two prior local repairs before the third issue, so the hard gate for triage should stay asleep.
